subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath attained unto the effulgent lights of the Countenance and placed his trust in God, the Single, the All-Knowing. By God! He that hath found [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن فاز بانوار الوجه و توکل علی الله الفرد الخبیر تالله من وجد
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Greatest Name, @laws of God; of the Kitab-i-Aqdas, @rejection, opposition and persecution
